ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Continued To Jun-13-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Order of Examination of Judgment debtor Lisa Jo Brewer.

Dept. 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Not Reported.

Judgment Creditor Mike Lin is represented by Diana Guadalupe, Esq.
Judgment Debtor Lisa Jo Brewer is present in pro per and placed under oath.

Judgment debtor is examined briefly.

Parties Stipulate to a continuance of the examination.

The Debtors examination is continued to June 13, 2025 at 11:00 am in Dept. 505 by stipulation of the parties.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Seth W. Wiener, Esq., appearing for and with Plaintiff, MIKE LIN, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendants LISA JO BREWER and MISSION ART GALLERY, LLC,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $57,200.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $557.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,757.90

Judgment is entered on the Complaint's Seventh Cause of Action for Intentional Misrepresentation. The Court finds that Defendants Brewer and Mission Art Gallery, LLC made false representation to Plaintiff, with knowledge of falsity and intent to defraud and Plaintiff justifiably relied and was damaged.

Judgment signed in open court.
